notes: partition 是 legacy 图，metadata 明确声明 useLegacyApi=true，因此前端请求路径是 `/superset/explore_json/`。
controlPanel 包含 `Query`、`Time Series Options`、`Chart Options`、`Advanced Analytics` 四段。
`formDataOverrides` 会调用 `getStandardizedControls().popAllColumns()` 与 `popAllMetrics()`，把标准化拖拽控件里的列和指标回写成 root `groupby` / `metrics`。
`PartitionViz.query_obj()` 在 `super().query_obj()` 之后，只额外根据 `time_series_option` 改写 `query_obj.is_timeseries`。

`PartitionViz.get_data()` 会严格按 `time_series_option` 分支：`not_time` 走普通层级聚合，`agg_sum|agg_mean` 走分层汇总，`point_diff|point_percent|point_factor` 走首尾时间点差异计算，`adv_anal` 走 `levels_for_time()` -> `process_data()`，`time_series` 则走包含时间层级的 `levels_for()`。
`groupby` 在当前图是高置信必填：`PartitionViz.get_data()` 在 `groups` 为空时会直接抛出 `Please choose at least one groupby`。
`partition_limit` 控件声明为整数文本，默认值是字符串 `'5'`；`partition_threshold` 控件声明为浮点文本，默认值是字符串 `'0.05'`，但 `transformProps.js` 当前对它使用的是 `parseInt(partitionThreshold, 10)`，因此小于 1 的小数会在运行时变成 `0`。
`time_compare` 与 `comparison_type` 虽然在 controlPanel 暴露出来，但当前 `PartitionViz.get_data()` 并不读取 `_extra_chart_data`，也不读取 `comparison_type`；它们在 partition 上缺少明确的前后端消费闭环。

legacy_api_behavior.frontend_build_query: Partition Chart 没有专属前端 buildQuery。ChartClient.ts 在 useLegacyApi=true 且未注册 buildQuery 时，会直接把原始 form_data 包装进 legacy payload。

query_compilation.base_query_effect: BaseViz.query_obj() 会根据 metrics、groupby、row_limit、limit、adhoc_filters 等构造基础 query_obj；NVD3TimeSeriesViz.query_obj() 会按 `timeseries_limit_metric` / 第一指标补充排序字段。
query_compilation.response_shape: `not_time` / `agg_*` / `point_*` / `time_series` 分支返回 `[{ name, val, children }]` 形式的层级树；`adv_anal` 分支返回按 metric / time / group 递归嵌套的 `nest_procs()` 结构。
query_compilation.advanced_analytics_scope: `rolling_type`、`rolling_periods`、`min_periods`、`resample_rule`、`resample_method`、`contribution` 只有在 `time_series_option='adv_anal'` 的 `levels_for_time()` -> `process_data()` 路径上有高置信生效。
query_compilation.frontend_post_processing: transformProps.js 会把 root `groupby` 转成 `levels`，把 `partition_limit` / `partition_threshold` 解析为数字，并把 `color_scheme`、`number_format`、`date_time_format`、`log_scale`、`equal_date_size`、`rich_tooltip`、`time_series_option` 透传成运行时 props。

Query.description: Select one or many metrics to display. You can use an aggregation function on a column or write custom SQL to create a metric.
字段标签为 Filters。legacy explore_json 路径会先把 legacy filters 转成 adhoc_filters，再继续处理 extra filters / extra_form_data。
Query.enum_source: datasource columns + saved metrics + 当前 metrics

Query.description: Dimensions contain qualitative values such as names, dates, or geographical data. Use dimensions to categorize, segment, and reveal the details in your data. Dimensions affect the level of detail in the view.
Query.notes: controlPanel 没有额外 validator，但 PartitionViz.get_data() 在 groups 为空时会直接抛错。

Query.description: Limits the number of series that get displayed. A joined subquery (or an extra phase where subqueries are not supported) is applied to limit the number of series that get fetched and rendered. This feature is useful when grouping by high cardinality column(s) though does increase the query complexity and cost.

Orders the query result that generates the source data for this chart. If a series or row limit is reached, this determines what data are truncated. If undefined, defaults to the first metric (where appropriate).
If enabled, this control sorts the results/values descending, otherwise it sorts the results ascending.
Compute the contribution to the total
Query.notes: 当前源码里它只在 `time_series_option='adv_anal'` 的 `process_data()` 路径上高置信生效。

Query.description: Limits the number of the rows that are computed in the query that is the source of the data used for this chart.

Time Series Options.notes: `time_series` 分支在后端是通过 `get_data()` 最后的 `else` 分支实现的；`adv_anal` 才会进入 `process_data()` 路径。

Chart Options.description: The color scheme for rendering chart
D3 format syntax for dates and times
Chart Options.notes: 只有当 `time_series_option in ['adv_anal', 'time_series']` 且当前节点被识别为日期层时，运行时才会真正格式化日期标签。

Chart Options.description: The maximum number of subdivisions of each group; lower values are pruned first
Partitions whose height to parent height proportions are below this value are pruned
Chart Options.notes: 控件声明 `isFloat=true`，但 transformProps.js 当前对它使用的是 `parseInt(partitionThreshold, 10)`；像 `0.05` 这样的值在运行时会变成 `0`。
运行时组件接收到的最终 prop 名是 `useLogScale`。

Chart Options.description: Check to force date partitions to have the same height
Chart Options.notes: 只有当 `time_series_option in ['adv_anal', 'time_series']` 时才有明确意义。

Chart Options.description: The rich tooltip shows a list of all series for that point in time

Advanced Analytics.description: Defines a rolling window function to apply, works along with the [Periods] text box
Advanced Analytics.notes: 只有 `time_series_option='adv_anal'` 时才会走到 `process_data()` 并高置信生效。

Advanced Analytics.description: Defines the size of the rolling window function, relative to the time granularity selected
Advanced Analytics.notes: 只有 `time_series_option='adv_anal'` 时才会高置信生效。

Advanced Analytics.description: The minimum number of rolling periods required to show a value.
Advanced Analytics.notes: 只有 `time_series_option='adv_anal'` 时才会高置信生效。

Advanced Analytics.description: Overlay one or more timeseries from a relative time period. Expects relative time deltas in natural language. Free text is supported.
Advanced Analytics.notes: 当前 PartitionViz.get_data() 不读取 `_extra_chart_data`；因此它在 partition 上缺少明确的消费闭环。

Advanced Analytics.description: How to display time shifts: as individual lines; as the difference between the main time series and each time shift; as the percentage change; or as the ratio between series and time shifts.
Advanced Analytics.notes: 当前 PartitionViz.get_data() 本身并不读取 `comparison_type`；partition 的真正差异模式来自 `time_series_option` 的 `point_diff|point_percent|point_factor`。
只有 `time_series_option='adv_anal'` 时才会高置信生效。
只有 `time_series_option='adv_anal'` 时才会高置信生效。
